event: Celebration of the General Peace of 1814 in East Bergholt
description: A landscape showing a village celebration with crowds of small figures gathered in an open area. Large flags and banners fly from tall poles — one appears to be golden-brown, another white. Trees frame the scene on the right, and a red brick building stands at the left. The crowd stretches across the middle ground. The sky is overcast and grey-blue, typical of English countryside weather. The painting has a sketchy, atmospheric quality with broad brushstrokes.

_meta.title: Celebration of the General Peace of 1814 in East Bergholt
